title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code explains Pi, describing it as a unique agent framework that enables novel use cases like OpenClaw. The video compares Pi against other coding agent tools including Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity, examining how it handles complex harness layer requirements.
